projectDescription: A remote MCP server that exposes Cloudflare R2 object storage operations to AI clients like ChatGPT via GitHub OAuth-protected Cloudflare Workers.
keyFeatures: Remote MCP endpoint on Cloudflare Workers for R2 object storage
GitHub OAuth authentication with configurable login allowlist
Full object CRUD: list, head, get, put, delete, copy, move, rename
Base64 upload and download transfer tools for binary objects
Optional presigned GET/PUT URL generation using R2 S3-compatible API
Optional read-only Cloudflare account/admin tools (bucket metadata, CORS, lifecycle, domains, notifications, metrics)
Root prefix scoping to restrict MCP access to a bucket subtree
Destructive operation guards with confirm: true and dryRun: true
Health endpoint (/healthz) for bucket accessibility verification
AUTH_MODE=none for local development without OAuth
publicApiSurface: GET /healthz — health and config status endpoint
POST /mcp — remote MCP endpoint (streamable HTTP)
GET /authorize — OAuth authorization start
GET /callback — GitHub OAuth callback
POST /token — OAuth token endpoint
POST /register — OAuth dynamic client registration
r2_object_list — list objects under root prefix
r2_object_head — get object metadata
r2_object_get — read text-like object body
r2_object_put — write UTF-8 text to an object
r2_object_put_if_absent — create object only if absent
r2_object_delete — delete one object (confirm: true)
r2_object_delete_many — delete multiple objects (confirm: true, dryRun optional)
r2_object_copy — copy object to new key
r2_object_move — move object (copy + delete, confirm: true, dryRun optional)
r2_object_rename — rename object within prefix (confirm: true, dryRun optional)
r2_upload_base64 — upload base64-encoded payload
r2_download_base64 — download object as base64
r2_presign_get — create presigned GET URL (optional)
r2_presign_put — create presigned PUT URL (optional)
r2_bucket_list — list buckets in account (optional admin)
r2_bucket_get — get bucket metadata (optional admin)
r2_cors_get — get bucket CORS rules (optional admin)
r2_lifecycle_get — get bucket lifecycle rules (optional admin)
r2_domain_custom_list — list custom domains (optional admin)
r2_domain_custom_get — get custom domain settings (optional admin)
r2_domain_managed_get — get r2.dev managed domain settings (optional admin)
r2_notifications_list — list event notification rules (optional admin)
r2_notifications_get — get one notification queue config (optional admin)
r2_metrics_get — get account-level R2 storage metrics (optional admin)
